page: Amazon Web Services r8id.48xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 192 vCPUs (96 physical cores) using the x86_64 Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor running at 3.9 GHz. The CPU includes 480 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX_TILE, AMX_INT8). The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance includes 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, offering high-capacity, low-latency local storage. Networking capabilities feature a baseline bandwidth of 75 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this configuration.

In benchmark evaluations, the r8id.48xlarge demonstrates top-tier performance in multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth for both cached and uncached read/write operations, and multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression. It also achieves top-tier results in Passmark database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput. For machine learning workloads, the hardware delivers top-tier prompt processing speeds across small, medium, and large LLM models, alongside strong to top-tier text generation performance.

Given its massive DDR5 memory capacity, high-speed local NVMe storage, and dedicated Intel Xeon compute resources, this instance offers high resource density for enterprise-scale workloads. It is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, large-scale Redis deployments, real-time data analytics, LLM inference, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services r8id.48xlarge is a memory-optimized, Nitro-hypervised instance featuring 192 vCPUs (96 physical cores) powered by an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor operating at 3.9 GHz. It is equipped with 1536.0 GB of DDR5 memory and 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, supported by a 75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance delivers top-tier performance in multi-core CPU benchmarks, memory bandwidth, and database operations, as well as strong-to-top-tier results in LLM inference and Redis operations. Designed for high-density resource allocation, it is optimized for memory-intensive databases, large-scale caching layers, and high-throughput data processing workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, massive DDR5 memory, and high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage.

1536.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory at 7 GHz
